hero.name: Vladimir
hero.subheadline: Frontend Developer with {years}+ years building modern web apps.
hero.description: React and Next.js developer focused on performance and clean UI. Currently working in the online gaming industry.

about.bio1: Frontend Developer with experience since 2021, currently at Gemini Infotech building web apps for the gaming industry.
about.bio2: Focused on reusable UI, REST APIs, performance optimization, and responsive interfaces.
about.bio3: I work closely with teams to build scalable and maintainable frontend systems.

contact.title: Let's work together

contact.infoText: I'm always open to discussing new projects, creative ideas, or opportunities to be part of your vision. Feel free to reach out through the form or directly via email.
